title: Architectural Facade & Engineering Solutions
description1: We transform architectural concepts into reliable, aesthetically refined spaces through innovative facade systems and engineering excellence.
description2: From modern office buildings to complex infrastructure projects, our solutions combine design precision with structural integrity.

title: Drywall & Glass Partitions
description1: Floor-to-ceiling glass systems with curved designs and geometric patterns for modern office spaces.
description2: Clean, professional wall systems with precision installation and seamless finishes.

title: WPC Panel Applications
description1: From residential feature walls to modern fencing systems, WPC panels offer sustainable.
description2: Weather-resistant solutions that combine natural aesthetics with engineered performance.

title: Renewable Solutions
description1: Integrating sustainable energy systems into architectural design.
description2: Solar panels, photovoltaic facades, and energy-efficient building solutions.

title: Windows Doors
description1: The All-Way Concealed Frame Option for HL Imperial Slim System redefines minimalist design.
description2: Vista Slim offers precisionengineered frames with slim sightlines that blend indoor comfort with grand outdoor views.

title: Louvers System
description1: consists of angled horizontal or vertical slats (fixed or adjustable) designed to control airflow, enhance privacy, and block sunlight, rain, and debris in residential, commercial, and industrial buildings
description2: Commonly made from aluminum, wood, or plastic, these systems improve energy efficiency, provide shade, and reduce noise, with applications ranging from facades and windows to automated roof systems.

title: ELKO EP Wired Device
description1: ELKOEP wired devices are based on the iNELS BUS wired automation system, designed for smart home and building automation. These devices communicate through a dedicated BUS cable, which connects sensors, switches, and actuators to a central controller.
description2: The wired BUS system ensures stable, fast, and reliable communication, without interference issues common in wireless systems. It allows centralized control of lighting, air conditioning, curtains, security systems, and other electrical devices.

title: ELKO EP Wireless
description1: ELKOEP wireless devices use RF (Radio Frequency) communication as part of the iNELS wireless automation system. These devices communicate wirelessly with the central controller, eliminating the need for additional communication cables.
description2: Wireless technology allows easy installation, especially in existing buildings where running new wires is difficult. The devices can control lighting, curtains, air conditioning, and other electrical systems remotely.
